rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
Respect AADL scope rules: component type contracts must reference visible ports, implementation contracts may bind outputs or auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers from the current AADL scope in AGREE annexes.
Do not introduce package-qualified names or AADL properties as AGREE variables.
Ensure AGREE clauses match the architectural scope of the target component type or implementation.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level assignments must reference valid output features or declared variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports or event ports as numeric values in AGREE.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
